justification: The diff only updates the Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.1 to 3.3.13 and the Java version from 11 to 21 in pom.xml, and cleans up wildcard imports in MavenWrapperDownloader.java. It does not demonstrate any Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) or removal of deprecated patterns. The changes are minimal and do not constitute a meaningful migration effort.
